headline: Honeywell Reshapes Aerospace Portfolio And Advances Toward Three Way Breakup
summary: Honeywell International (NasdaqGS:HON) has granted Innovative Aerosystems an exclusive perpetual license over its aircraft power generating systems, including customer contracts, IP, OEM and aftermarket rights, and related program assets. The transfer covers both commercial and defense aircraft applications and marks a clear monetization move within Honeywell's Aerospace segment. The company is also progressing toward a planned three way breakup, with regulatory steps under way and a...
